transcript: Everything hurts What hurts everything everything doesn't hurt my head hurts you pedantic prick just get over it i don't even remember how we got locked down here locked what did you drink the key to Just get off your butt and help me find a way out of here. Yes ma'am lieutenant colonel. This is pointless. You've barely tried anything. This is pointless. You barely tried anything. This is exactly like when you helped me move last summer. Critical thinking hurts. It's not like I meant to drop that TV. Pop and Abby will have me out here. Yes, Your Majesty. I don't think there's any way for us to get out of here. Splashily with you barely even helping me. What do you think? Chris? Why don't we go around the door? What? Why don't we walk around? There's no wall. Just ends. Chris, which feels that you're taking? Did you take mine? Come on Chris, I got it open. Let's get out of here, quickly! Chris, come back! Wait! Come with me, please! Succes! Thanks for watching!
